title: DeepSeek Node fails to connect after update
symptom: After updating to n8n v2.12.3, the DeepSeek node cannot authenticate or connect, while it works in v2.2.6.
not_this_if: DeepSeek node works in older versions
root_cause: The issue arises from a conflict between the official DeepSeek node and any community versions that may have been installed. This conflict can prevent proper authentication and connection to the DeepSeek service.
fix_steps: Uninstall any community DeepSeek node from your n8n instance.
If the issue persists, revoke existing credentials and create new ones for the DeepSeek node.
As an alternative, consider using an HTTP node or an inference provider like Groq or Openrouter.
agent_instruction: Uninstall any community DeepSeek node and restart the n8n server.
